Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Deconstruct and Analyze the Normative Rules Part 1 Sequence App Recv Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Approved Finalize Docs Close Case Specific Ordering Rules Credit Check Risk Assessment Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Loan Decision Approved Finalize Docs Close Case Rejected No Finalize Docs General No skipping no reversing no contradictions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 1 against Normative Rules Log App Recv 0900 Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Finalize Docs 1330 Close Case 1400 Check Order Credit Check 0930 Risk Assessment 1000 Yes Risk Assessment 1000 Loan Decision 1100 Yes Inform Applicant 1300 Loan Decision 1100 Yes Loan Decision is Approved Yes Finalize Docs 1330 Close Case 1400 Yes Any skipping No Any reversal No Result Case 1 is fully compliant with normative rules

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 2 against Normative Rules Log App Recv 0800 Risk Assessment 0820 Credit Check 0900 Loan Decision 0930 Finalize Docs 1000 Close Case 1030 Check Order Credit Check 0900 Risk Assessment 0820 NO Risk Assessment happened before Credit Check Violation Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment 0820 Loan Decision 0930 Yes Inform Applicant is missing The log shows Loan Decision Finalize Docs Close Case It does not show Inform Applicant Violation Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision Also skipping steps is forbidden Loan Decision is Rejected Yes Finalize Docs 1000 exists YES Violation If loan is rejected do not finalize documentation Result Case 2 has multiple normative violations Order reversal Risk before Credit Skipping Inform Applicant and Contradiction Finalize Docs after Rejection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze Case 3 against Normative Rules Log App Recv 0900 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Risk Assessment 1100 Loan Decision 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Finalize Docs Jan 17 0900 Close Case Jan 17 1000 Check Order Credit Check Risk Assessment Yes 1000 1100 Risk Assessment Loan Decision Yes 1100 1200 Inform Applicant Loan Decision Yes Jan 16 Jan 14 Loan Decision is Approved Yes Finalize Docs Close Case Yes 0900 1000 Any skipping No Result Case 3 is fully compliant with normative rules The dates are spread out but the order is correct

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze Desiderata Part 2 Rules Credit Check within 24 hours of App Recv Inform Applicant within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call encouraged before Close Case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 1 Desiderata App Recv 0900 Credit Check 0930 Diff 30 mins 24 hours Yes Loan Decision 1100 Inform Applicant 1300 Diff 2 hours 48 hours Yes Follow up Call not mentioned in log Usually if it is not in the log it did not happen So all cases fail the Follow up Call desideratum Result Case 1 Credit Check OK Inform OK Follow up Missing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 2 Credit Check OK Inform Missing so Inform cannot be checked for timing or is failed The desideratum is Inform within 48 hours If you never inform you failed But Case 2 already failed norms I should mention it Case 2 Credit Check OK Inform Missing Follow up Missing

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case 3 App Recv Jan 12 0900 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Diff 25 hours 24 hours YES Violation Loan Decision Jan 14 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Diff 2 days 3 hours 51 hours 48 hours YES Violation Follow up Missing Summary Desiderata Case 3 Credit Check 24h Inform 48h Follow up Missing

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Interpretations or Justifications Case 2 Why did Risk happen before Credit Maybe expedited process error or data already available Why Finalize Docs after Rejection System glitch administrative cleanup or Finalize meant something else Why missing Inform Email auto sent not logged or negligence Case 3 Why delays Resource constraints holidays complex risk assessment Why no follow up Automation General Logs might be incomplete Activities might be parallel in reality but logged sequentially

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Refine Self Correction Critique Case 2 Inform The normative rule says Inform Applicant must occur So Case 2 skips Inform Applicant This is a normative violation In desiderata if Inform is skipped the timing desideratum Inform within 48 hours is impossible to meet I should state that Case 2 fails the timing desideratum implicitly because it fails the activity existence but the primary issue is the normative skip Critique Case 3 Credit Check Jan 12 0900 to Jan 14 1000 Thats 49 hours Definitely 24 hours Critique Case 3 Inform Jan 14 1200 to Jan 16 1500 Jan 16 1200 would be 48 hours Event is 3 hours late Violation Critique Case 1 Follow up The log does not show it So Case 1 also lacks Follow up Result All cases fail Follow up Call desideratum Case 3 fails timing desiderata Case 2 fails Inform timing due to skip

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Structure the Response Task 1 Normative Violations Case 1 Compliant Case 2 Violations Risk before Credit Missing Inform Finalize Docs after Rejection Case 3 Compliant Task 2 Desiderata Failures Case 1 Follow up Call missing Case 2 Follow up Call missing Inform missing though normative violation dominates Case 3 Credit Check delay Inform delay Follow up Call missing Clarification Emphasize these are suboptimal not hard errors Task 3 Interpretations General logs capture execution not intent Justifications often lie in resource availability or system limitations
